import React from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import "./navbar.css"; function Navbar() { const token = localStorage.getItem("token"); //agr token hai to login kro return (
{!token ? (
  • Sign Up
  • Sign In
) : (
  • Add Course
  • Register Course
  • Drop Course
  • Course Timetable
  • Feedback
  • { localStorage.removeItem("token") }}>Sign Out
)}
); } export default Navbar;
